name: Aperture Ring Dish

product_dna.core_purpose: Hold rings and small jewelry beside a bed, sink, or vanity.
product_dna.design_philosophy: A circular aperture nested in an arch turns a simple dish into a quiet landmark.
product_dna.emotional_appeal: A reliable place for a valued small object.
product_dna.target_customer: Minimal-interior and gift customers who wear daily jewelry.
product_dna.functional_benefits: Shallow catch area with a central ring-rest feature.
product_dna.decorative_benefits: Architectural negative space and mineral tactility.
product_dna.print_complexity: Low to moderate; contact surfaces and shallow basin require testing.
product_dna.material_efficiency: Compact and shallow, with low expected resin volume.
product_dna.brand_alignment: Highest alignment in the launch set.
product_dna.future_evolution: Travel mini, paired earring tray, premium relief, and physical gift edition.
product_dna.physical_manufacturing_potential: Strong small-batch candidate after skin-contact, washability, and stability review.

design_tokens.wall_thickness: Compact solid base with tested basin
design_tokens.shadow_language: Circular inner shadow and soft outer falloff
design_tokens.material_simulation: Honest resin with optional mineral pigment look

market_demand.rationale: EVD-004 shows repeated jewelry-tray and vanity uses, but the page mixes physical, mold, and digital products.

competition_opportunity.rationale: EVD-004 shows many arch and jewelry-tray alternatives, reducing whitespace.

profitability.rationale: EVD-004 shows varied physical and digital price points, but actual Atlas costs and conversion are Unknown.

evergreen_potential.rationale: EVD-004 repeatedly connects trays with jewelry, nightstand, vanity, and organization uses.

brand_alignment.rationale: EVD-009 marks product-specific validation Unknown; aperture, arch, and restrained depth closely fit the brand.

collection_potential.rationale: EVD-003 and EVD-004 show strong adjacency across entryway, vanity, shelf, and gift contexts.

bundle_potential.rationale: EVD-007 demonstrates multi-part collection packaging; the ring dish can anchor smaller companion objects.

physical_product_potential.rationale: EVD-004 shows many physical jewelry and arch trays, supporting physical-category adjacency.

seo_opportunity.rationale: EVD-004 supplies ring dish, jewelry tray, vanity, nightstand, and arch language without volume data.

resin_printability.rationale: EVD-009 marks resin validation Unknown; compact shallow geometry is the least complex launch hypothesis.

ai_production_efficiency.rationale: EVD-009 marks production evidence Unknown; the design uses a small parametric feature set.

customer_value.rationale: EVD-004 repeatedly shows jewelry storage and display as a clear customer use.

production_simplicity.rationale: EVD-009 marks resin validation Unknown; a compact one-piece dish should be simple relative to vessels and tiles.

marketplace_fit.rationale: EVD-004 supports Etsy adjacency; direct Cults3D ring-dish evidence is Unknown.

risks: Market willingness to pay is unknown
improvement_actions: Prototype basin depths and aperture sizes

change_history.change: Selected as low-confidence hero candidate for validation.
